name: Elim Girma
headline: Protecting Communities Through Cyber Innovation
photoAlt: Elim Girma, 2025 East African Youth Scholarship recipient
blurb: A first-generation Eritrean-American channeling her talents toward a career as a Cybersecurity Analyst, driven to shield others from digital threats.
story: For our selection committee, Elim Girma's application was a standout — an immediate choice for the East African Youth Scholarship. She graduated in the top 10% of her class while leading numerous student organizations, pairing exceptional communication skills with a fierce work ethic.

A first-generation Eritrean-American, Elim is channeling her talents toward a career as a Cybersecurity Analyst. For her, this scholarship is far more than a door to higher education; it's a vote of confidence that lets her deepen her studies, build professional networks, and step into a new independence.
Driven by a calling to shield others from digital threats, Elim is moving into a career where her leadership will safeguard data and uplift her community.
quote: Growing up, higher education has always been the goal. I'm inspired to help people through cybersecurity, and I knew the Tombossa B Foundation was just the right place to do so.

name: Mattania Biniam
headline: Engineering Impact Through Analytics
photoAlt: Mattania Biniam, 2025 East African Youth Scholarship recipient, in a white suit
blurb: An Eritrean-American headed to SMU to study Management Science, with a vision to use data and analytics to make a positive impact on the world.
story: For our selection committee, awarding Mattania Biniam the East African Youth Scholarship was an easy decision. He embodies the very spirit of our foundation — excelling in the classroom, leading in his community, and competing on the court, all with remarkable drive.

An Eritrean-American headed to Southern Methodist University to study Management Science, Mattania carries both a rich heritage and a bold future. For his family, this scholarship is more than financial relief; it's a vote of confidence from a community that believes in him.
With a vision to use data and analytics to leave a positive footprint on the world, Mattania is exactly the kind of leader our community is proud to invest in.
quote: I wanted to be part of a community that understands both my heritage and my dreams. It's not just financial help — it's encouragement, and a reminder that my community believes in me.
